title: Blackspur 4pc Multicolour Aluminium Spring Snaps Set - 4 Sizes - Small Metal Carabiner Key Keyring Chain Hook Bag Clip Fastener
features: This set contains 4 colourful assorted sizes of spring links which are manufactured from aluminium.
They are extremely useful for a variety of purposes but are only suitable for lightweight use & should not be used for any heavy duty work including climbing.
Approx Sizes: 6 x 3mm, 55 x 28mm, 42 x 22mm, 32 x 21mm
